untranslatable_reason: Signal requires peer group relative analysis (comparing target market performance to peer markets' strength and intraday highs). No allowed indicators support cross-market correlation analysis or peer comparison. The core logic—'underperformance relative to peers'—cannot be expressed with single-market indicators only. Entry also requires detection of positive news/conditions (external data source not in indicator list).
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using price action proxies: intraday underperformance approximated as close in bottom 33% of range (body_pct < 0.33) and high not reaching pivot/resistance (high < pivot as peer proxy). Exit on close above entry open is translatable. However, the essential peer comparison logic and news detection components are untranslatable within the allowed indicator set.
